title: phoenicanthemum speciosum
intro: Phoenicanthemum speciosum, also known as the "Flame of the Woods," is a flowering plant native to China, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phoenicanthemum speciosum include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
